groups.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this group?
groups.error_ordre_duplicate: Order {ordre} is already used in this section

legacy_redirect.info: This page is not yet available in the new interface. You will be redirected to the legacy interface.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.empty: No data found. Select at least one competition.

params.title: Parameters
params.multi_select_hint: Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple competitions

descriptions.Buteurs: Top individual scorers ranking (sorted by goals descending)
descriptions.Attaque: Teams ranked by goals scored (sorted descending)
descriptions.Defense: Teams ranked by goals conceded (sorted ascending, less = better)
descriptions.Cartons: Cards per player: green, yellow, red, exclusion red (sorted by severity)
descriptions.CartonsEquipe: Cards per team: green, yellow, red, exclusion red (sorted by severity)
descriptions.CartonsCompetition: Summary by competition: finished/validated games, goals, G/Y/R/D cards
descriptions.Fairplay: Individual fairplay score: Green=1pt, Yellow=2pts, Red/Escl=4pts (sorted ascending, less = better)
descriptions.FairplayEquipe: Team fairplay score: Green=1pt, Yellow=2pts, Red/Escl=4pts (sorted ascending, less = better)
descriptions.Arbitrage: Games refereed per person: first, second, total (FFCK only)
descriptions.ArbitrageEquipe: Games refereed per team: first, second, total
descriptions.CJouees: Games played per competitor, grouped by current club (validated games only)
descriptions.CJouees2: Games played per competitor, grouped by competition team (validated games)
descriptions.CJouees3: Irregularities: old season license, missing/PAGJ/PAGB paddle, CK certificate NO (played games only)
descriptions.CJouees3b: Team roster check: license, paddle, CK certificate. Includes coaches/referees/inactive (in grey)
descriptions.CJoueesN: Games played per competitor filtered on French Championships (N* code)
descriptions.CJoueesCF: Games played per competitor filtered on French Cup (CF* code)
descriptions.OfficielsJournees: Gamedays with assigned officials: RC, R1, delegate, head referee
descriptions.OfficielsMatchs: Games with all officials: referees, line judges, secretary, timer, shot clock
descriptions.ListeArbitres: All FFCK referees: club, level, training season, booklet
descriptions.ListeEquipes: Registered teams with club, CD, CR and players' current clubs
descriptions.ListeJoueurs: Registered players (excl. coaches): current club, category, team club
descriptions.ListeJoueurs2: Registered players AND coaches: current club, category, team club
descriptions.LicenciesNationaux: FFCK licensees who played: M/F breakdown by age category (U16/U18/U23/U35/+35)
descriptions.CoherenceMatchs: Consistency check: refereeing under 1h after game, game under 1h after refereeing, over 6 games/day, over 3 games/4h

rankings.no_type: Ranking type not defined for this competition

images.title: Image Management
images.confirm_rename_message: This will rename the image file.

players.title: Player Merge
players.auto_merge_description: Automatically merges non-federal players (ID > 2M) with same name and club.
players.confirm_merge_message: This action is irreversible. The source player will be deleted and all data transferred to the target player.
players.confirm_auto_merge_message: This will merge all duplicate non-federal players. This action is irreversible.

codes.title: Competition Code Change
codes.confirm_change_message: This will change the competition code in all related tables.

import_export.title: Import / Export
import_export.import_warning: Import will overwrite existing event data. This action is irreversible.
import_export.confirm_import_message: This will replace all event data with the JSON file content.

seasons.title: Season Management
seasons.confirm_activate_message: This season will become the active season.

system.title: System Operations
system.purge_description: Deletes game cache files (>1 year) and event cache files (>2 years).
system.success_purge: Cache purged: {matchFiles} game files, {eventFiles} event files deleted
